description: Escape to the enchanting coastal towns of Da Nang and Hoi An, where golden beaches meet rich history and vibrant culture. This 5-day adventure will take you from the stunning shores of Da Nang to the lantern-lit streets of Hoi An, immersing you in the local flavors and breathtaking sights. Perfect for friends seeking a blend of relaxation and exploration, this trip promises unforgettable memories and a taste of Vietnam's charm.

activities.activity: Lunch at Banh Xeo Ba Duong
activities.description: Start your culinary adventure with a delicious plate of Banh Xeo, a Vietnamese pancake filled with shrimp and bean sprouts, at this local favorite. The vibrant atmosphere and authentic flavors will set the tone for your trip!

Spend a relaxing afternoon at My Khe Beach, known for its soft white sand and clear blue waters. It's the perfect spot to swim, sunbathe, or simply enjoy the stunning coastal views. Don't forget your sunscreen!

As the sun sets, head to the Da Nang Night Market. Explore the vibrant stalls filled with local crafts, souvenirs, and delicious street food. It's a great place to immerse yourself in the local culture and try some tasty snacks!

activities.activity: Dinner at Quan Com Hue Ngon
activities.description: Enjoy a hearty dinner at this popular restaurant known for its Hue-style dishes. Try the Bun Bo Hue, a spicy beef noodle soup that will tantalize your taste buds. The casual setting makes it a great place to unwind after a day of exploring.

activities.activity: Evening stroll along the Han River
activities.description: End your day with a leisurely walk along the Han River. The illuminated bridges and city skyline create a magical atmosphere, perfect for taking photos and enjoying the cool evening breeze.

transit.memo: Take a local bus to the Marble Mountains, a must-see natural wonder.

activities.description: Explore the stunning Marble Mountains, a cluster of five marble and limestone hills. Climb to the top for breathtaking views and visit the hidden caves and pagodas nestled within the mountains.
Savor a bowl of Mi Quang, a local specialty noodle dish, at Mi Quang 1A. This restaurant is known for its authentic flavors and generous portions, perfect for refueling after your morning adventure.
Spend a relaxing afternoon at My Khe Beach, known for its soft white sand and clear blue waters. Enjoy swimming, sunbathing, or simply taking in the beautiful coastal scenery.

activities.activity: Dinner at Waterfront Danang Restaurant & Bar
activities.description: Dine at Waterfront Danang, where you can enjoy delicious seafood and Vietnamese dishes while overlooking the Han River. The ambiance is perfect for unwinding after a day of exploration.
Experience the beauty of Da Nang at night with a scenic cruise on the Han River. Enjoy the illuminated skyline and the famous Dragon Bridge, which breathes fire and water on weekends.

transit.memo: A scenic drive along the coast to Hoi An.

activities.description: Explore the enchanting streets of Hoi An Ancient Town, a UNESCO World Heritage site. The well-preserved architecture and vibrant colors of the buildings create a picturesque setting, perfect for leisurely strolls and photography.
Savor traditional Vietnamese dishes at Morning Glory, a popular restaurant known for its local specialties like Cao Lau and fresh spring rolls. The cozy atmosphere adds to the dining experience.
Visit the iconic Japanese Covered Bridge, a symbol of Hoi An. This charming structure, adorned with intricate carvings, offers a glimpse into the town's rich cultural history.
Head to An Bang Beach for some sun and sea. Enjoy swimming in the clear waters and relaxing on the sandy beach, a perfect way to unwind after exploring the town.
Dine at The Fisherman, a beachfront restaurant known for its fresh seafood and stunning sunset views. Enjoy a delicious meal while listening to the sound of the waves.
Experience the magical Hoi An Lantern Festival, where the streets are illuminated with colorful lanterns. Stroll along the riverside and enjoy the festive atmosphere, a perfect end to your day.

Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Morning Glory, known for its traditional Vietnamese dishes. Try the Cao Lau, a local specialty that combines noodles, pork, and fresh herbs for a perfect morning boost.
Spend a relaxing morning at An Bang Beach, where you can swim in the clear blue waters and soak up the sun. The beach is lined with charming cafes and beach bars, perfect for a refreshing drink.

Enjoy a seafood lunch at The Fisherman, a local favorite known for its fresh catches and stunning views of the ocean. Don't miss their grilled fish and shrimp dishes, which are both flavorful and affordable.

Wander through the UNESCO World Heritage-listed Hoi An Ancient Town. Admire the well-preserved architecture, vibrant shops, and the iconic Japanese Covered Bridge. This area is perfect for photography and soaking in the local culture.

Savor a delightful dinner at Cargo Club, where you can enjoy a mix of Vietnamese and international cuisine. The riverside setting offers a beautiful view, especially as the lanterns begin to light up the town.

Experience the magical Hoi An Lantern Festival, where the streets are illuminated with colorful lanterns. Join the locals in releasing lanterns on the river for good luck and enjoy the festive atmosphere with live music and performances.

days.title: Return to Da Nang and Departure

transit.memo: A scenic drive along the coast, enjoy the views of the beach.

activities.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Morning Glory, known for its traditional Vietnamese dishes. Try the Cao Lau, a local specialty that combines noodles, pork, and fresh herbs.
Spend a leisurely morning at An Bang Beach, where you can swim in the clear waters and soak up the sun. The beach is lined with charming cafes where you can grab a refreshing drink.
Enjoy a seafood lunch at The Fisherman, a local favorite known for its fresh catches and stunning views of the ocean. Don't miss their grilled fish and shrimp dishes.
Take a stroll through the UNESCO World Heritage site of Hoi An Ancient Town. Admire the well-preserved architecture and vibrant lanterns that fill the streets, especially beautiful during the day.
Head back to Da Nang, taking in the coastal scenery along the way. This is a great time to reflect on your trip and enjoy the last moments of your vacation.

activities.activity: Departure from Da Nang International Airport
activities.description: Arrive at Da Nang International Airport for your departure. Make sure to arrive early to check in and enjoy any last-minute shopping at the airport.
